Skyes Over London Mail Network
SkyeMail Platform Hub
Standalone Home Open Command Workspace
Hub Mailbox Compose Campaigns Ops Command
Standalone Mail Control Plane

SkyeMail now has a coherent platform shell over the real standalone vault, not just a one-off compose form.

This suite layer stages handoffs, drafts, campaign planning, and operations notes while the real mailbox, compose, contacts, and settings surfaces continue to run from the standalone SkyeMail app in this same folder.

Open Mailbox Control Open Compose Studio Open Campaign Lanes
Live Surfaces6 route-safe pages
Recent Handoffs0
Draft Queue0
Campaigns0
Platform Surfaces

What the standalone suite now owns

Mailbox Control Triage live inbox work, thread pressure, drafts, and recovery activity before acting. Compose Studio Stage outbound copy and hand it directly into the real standalone compose lane. Campaign Lanes Keep follow-up sequences and launch batches separate from the live mailbox. Mail Ops Track sender posture, onboarding, keys, and recovery notes in one place. Command Workspace Launch the real standalone inbox, compose, settings, and contacts surfaces from one command deck.
Standalone Contract

What still depends on runtime vars

Provider AuthGoogle OAuth, Gmail watch, inbound webhooks, and DB credentials still come from env.
Route SafetyThe suite is now self-contained under `suite/` and can also mount under `/SkyeMail/...`.
State ModelSuite drafts, campaigns, and ops notes persist locally even before provider wiring is live.
Real SurfacesThe command deck now opens the actual standalone pages instead of dead `/api/skymail-*` mock routes.
Compose Intake

Stage outbound mail from the hub

Campaign Planning

Keep sequence work out of the inbox

Ops Posture

Track sender-health and escalations
